<!--
Thanks for contributing to Tamlil! Please read CONTRIBUTING.md first —
in particular the "How merges work" note, which explains that accepted PRs
are merged out of band and land in a later release snapshot rather than via
the merge button.
-->

## Summary

What does this change do, and why?

## Related issue

Closes #... (or: link the issue this addresses).

## How it was tested

- [ ] `make check` passes locally (ruff + pytest + Swift self-check)
- [ ] Added or updated tests where it made sense
- Notes on manual testing, if any:

## Checklist

- [ ] Every commit is signed off (`git commit -s`) per the DCO — see CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] No `dictionary.json`, `learned.jsonl`, recordings, or other meeting-derived data is included
- [ ] No secrets or API keys are committed
- [ ] I have read and agree to the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
